parallel_group.prompt: Read agent-io/prds/work-notebooks/fullprompt.md (Module 5, folded clarifications #4/#7, advisory #2/#3, ACs 18-21, 27). Author a NEW kbu-run command skill in ClaudeCommands (agent-io/skills/kbu-run.md), work-notebook scope only, no BERIL references. It runs interactively inside a work-notebook repo with phases: (1) Orient from the filesystem only (list PRJ-* folders, show numbered notebooks in the active PRJ, read util.py and notebooks/.kbu-run.json; no manifest read/write); (2) Grill one notebook at a time (purpose, input data, analysis, expected output) and assign the next zero-padded NN_<snake_case_title>.ipynb (normalization per #7; collision -> next free number); (3) Build per the jupyter-dev cell discipline, extending util.py helpers; (4) Hand off to interactive JupyterLab to RUN cells (no programmatic execution by default), help debug on reported errors; (5) Invoke the manifest-free synthesize to write/update the PRJ REPORT.md; (6) Save an AIAssistant session record via assistant.state.save_session with command='kbu-run' and the standard fields (project_id, topics_discussed, decisions_made, work_submitted, next_steps, summary), degrading gracefully when AIAssistant is absent; (7) Loop or wrap. Add its skill_registry.json entry.
parallel_group.success_criteria: kbu-run skill exists in ClaudeCommands, work-notebook scope only, describing the orient->grill->build->JupyterLab-handoff->synthesize->save_session loop, filesystem-only orientation (no manifest), the NN_ naming+collision rule, and a save_session payload with command='kbu-run' and the standard session fields. No BERIL references.

parallel_group.prompt: Read agent-io/prds/work-notebooks/fullprompt.md (Module 1, folded clarifications #1/#2/#3/#5/#6/#8, advisory #1/#4, ACs 1-14, 26; Testing Decisions). In KBUtilLib, add the idempotent CLI subcommand 'kbu notebook-init <repo> [--project <topic>] [--update]' (adapt from new_project.py + init_notebook.py + layout.py). Behavior: bare name -> ~/Dropbox/Projects/<name>, full path verbatim. Repo missing -> bootstrap (git init; <repo_basename>.code-workspace with at least {"folders":[{"path":"."}]}, extra keys allowed; .claude/ initialized via claude-skills when ClaudeCommands present else empty dir + notice; notebooks/ with models/genomes/data + first PRJ-<topic>/). Repo present, notebooks/ missing -> scaffold notebooks tree + first PRJ. notebooks/ present -> add named PRJ-<topic>/ (topic normalized per advisory #1); refuse (non-zero, no writes) if PRJ exists. --update -> re-deploy the work-notebook bundle into .claude only. Each PRJ gets the rendered work-notebook util.py, empty NBCache/ and NBOutput/, and the idempotent gitignore block. Registry+binding: when assistant.state importable, attach to an existing registry entry by repo_path else register id worknb-<repo_basename>, and write notebooks/.kbu-run.json {"project_id":...}; when not importable, write the binding with worknb-<repo_basename> + notice. Bundle deployment: deploy the work-notebook collection (jupyter-dev,kbu-run,synthesize) via claude-skills when ClaudeCommands present (CONFIRM the exact claude-skills invocation via the claude-commands-expert skill; do NOT invent CLI syntax); direct-copy fallback from ClaudeCommands agent-io/skills/{jupyter-dev,kbu-run,synthesize}.md if claude-skills cannot target an arbitrary path; skip+notice+exit 0 if ClaudeCommands absent. CRITICAL: never deploy BERIL skills to a work-notebook repo. TESTS (primary target): the three branch cases against a temp dir, clobber-refusal (non-zero, no writes), --update idempotency, the produced filesystem tree + gitignore block + .code-workspace + .kbu-run.json; exercise registry/bundle steps in their AIAssistant-absent / ClaudeCommands-absent degraded form so tests need no live services.
parallel_group.success_criteria: kbu notebook-init implements all three branch cases + clobber-refusal + --update; produces the specified tree (models/genomes/data, PRJ-<normalized-topic>/ with util.py/NBCache/NBOutput), .code-workspace, gitignore block, and .kbu-run.json with project_id worknb-<repo_basename>; deploys only the work-notebook bundle and never BERIL skills; degrades gracefully without AIAssistant/ClaudeCommands. Scaffolding tests (branches, clobber-refusal, idempotency, degraded mode) pass.
